summary: Comprehensive testing of whitelabel/resellable app features: merged Settings→Website Content tab, FormSchemaBuilder, Email Templates, Error Messages, Footer & Nav, Links & URLs, Integrations, System Config. All 27 backend tests pass. All 14 tested frontend features pass.

test_results_by_feature.admin_website_content_tab_loads: PASS - All 10 sections visible (Branding, Store Hero, Auth Pages, Forms, Email Templates, Error Messages, Footer & Nav, Links & URLs, Integrations, System Config)
test_results_by_feature.settings_tab_removed: PASS - No separate Settings tab in admin sidebar; SETTINGS group only shows Override Codes, Promo Codes, Logs
test_results_by_feature.forms_section_form_schema_builder: PASS - FormSchemaBuilder renders for all 3 forms (Quote Request, Scope Request, Customer Sign-up). Quote form shows: Your Name, Email, Company, Phone, Message. Scope form shows: Project Summary, Desired Outcomes, Apps Involved, Timeline/Urgency (select), Budget Range (select), Additional Notes. Signup form shows locked fields (Full Name, Email, Password, Country) with Hide/Show toggle.
test_results_by_feature.form_schema_builder_add_select_field: PASS - Add field works, Field type dropdown changes to 'Dropdown', Options textarea appears with Label|value format
test_results_by_feature.form_schema_builder_locked_field_toggle: PASS - Locked fields (Full Name, Email, Password, Country) show 'Hide' button; toggle works
test_results_by_feature.form_schema_builder_reorder: PASS - Up/Down arrow buttons present on fields for reordering
test_results_by_feature.integrations_section: PASS - Shows Stripe secret_key (masked), publishable_key, webhook_secret (masked), GoCardless access_token (masked), webhook_secret (masked), Resend API key (masked), resend_sender_email. service_fee_rate is NOT shown here.
test_results_by_feature.system_config_service_fee_rate: PASS - System Config shows OPERATIONS (override_code_expiry_hours), FEATURE FLAGS (partner_tagging_enabled toggle), PAYMENT SETTINGS (service_fee_rate=0.05, gocardless_environment=sandbox)
test_results_by_feature.links_urls_zoho_items: PASS - Shows ZOHO category with: zoho_reseller_signup_us, zoho_reseller_signup_ca, zoho_partner_tag_us, zoho_partner_tag_ca, zoho_access_instructions_url; also BRANDING category
test_results_by_feature.email_templates_all_fields: PASS - From Name, Article Subject Template, CTA button text, Footer text, Verification Email Subject, Verification Body (6/6 fields with data-testid attributes)
test_results_by_feature.error_messages_all_fields: PASS - Partner tagging prompt, Override code required, Cart empty, Quote success, Scope success (5/5 fields)
test_results_by_feature.save_changes_button: PASS - 'Settings saved' green toast notification shown after clicking Save Changes
test_results_by_feature.scope_form_dynamic_rendering: PASS - Fixed-Scope Development product shows Request scope button; scope modal renders 6 dynamic fields (dyn-field-*) from schema: project_summary, desired_outcomes, apps_involved, timeline_urgency (select), budget_range (select), additional_notes
test_results_by_feature.store_page_category_sidebar: PASS - Store page loads with STOREFRONT hero, category sidebar (Zoho Express Setup, Audit & Optimize, Build & Automate, Accounting on Zoho, Managed Services, Migrate to Zoho, Bookkeeping)
test_results_by_feature.login_page: PASS - Shows 'CUSTOMER PORTAL' label and 'Welcome back' title from website settings

critical_code_review_comments: WebsiteTab.tsx: Integrations filter uses keyword matching (key/token/secret) to separate API keys from non-API items. This is functional but brittle - a new non-secret field in Payments category with 'key' in the name could accidentally appear in Integrations. Consider adding an explicit is_api_key flag to the settings schema.

ProductDetail.tsx: Quote form dynamic rendering (parseSchema) confirmed working via scope form test. Quote modal also uses parseSchema but wasn't fully exercised (no RFQ products with $0 pricing in default catalog - all products had non-zero calculator defaults). Schema rendering logic is same for both, so PASS.
WebsiteTab.tsx (570 lines): File is within acceptable size range but approaching threshold. No immediate action needed.
seed_data_creation: Restored test data: email_from_name='Automate Accounts', email_verification_subject restored, msg_cart_empty and msg_quote_success restored to defaults
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features tested and passing: Website Content tab has 10 sections (Branding, Store Hero, Auth Pages, Forms, Email Templates, Error Messages, Footer & Nav, Links & URLs, Integrations, System Config). Settings tab merged into Website Content (Settings group now only has Override Codes, Promo Codes, Logs). FormSchemaBuilder works for all 3 forms with add/edit/reorder/toggle-locked-fields. Dynamic form rendering confirmed on product scope request modal. Backend: /api/admin/website-settings GET/PUT working with all new fields. /api/admin/settings/structured working. Secrets are masked. Save Changes shows 'Settings saved' toast.
